Indicates whether this quarter also ends a fiscal year. This indicator shows when the TTM (Trailing Twelve Months) fields from the cash flow statement and the income statement are also for a fiscal year. N.B. This indicator does not mean that the financials are for a fiscal year rather than a quarter; it simply means that a fiscal year ended with this quarter so that the TTM figures in this row happen to be for the fiscal year. This indicator will always show an A for the PRIORFY and the MATCHFY groups. This indicator will sometimes show an A for the PRIORQU or the MATCHQU groups. This will mean that the quarter in question ended with a fiscal year. However, to be sure of the correct event matching fiscal year figures, the data from the PRIORFY or the MATCHFY groups must be used because it is one thing to match the current or prior quarter and another thing to match the current or prior fiscal year

Indicates whether this quarter also ends a Fiscal Year. This indicator shows when the TTM (Trailing Twelve Months) fields from the cash flow statement and the income statement are also for a fiscal year. N.B. This indicator does not mean that the financials are for a Fiscal Year rather than a quarter; it simply means that a fiscal year ended with this quarter so that the TTM figures in this row happen to be for the fiscal year. This indicator will always show an A for the PRIORFY and the MATCHFY groups. This indicator will sometimes show an A for the PRIORQU or the MATCHQU groups. This will mean that the quarter in question ended with a fiscal year. However, to be sure of the correct event matching Fiscal Year Figures, the data from the PRIORFY or the MATCHFY groups must be used because it is one thing to match the current or prior quarter and another thing to match the current or prior Fiscal Year
